calls.notes: Programmatic click on the hidden <input type='file'> via React ref; delegates to the browser's native OS file picker. If uploading===true the button is disabled and this handler is never reached.

Wraps axios.post('/upload', formData, { headers: { 'Content-Type': 'multipart/form-data' } }). FormData carries field 'file' (binary blob) and field 'name' (filename string). JWT Bearer token is attached by the axios request interceptor reading localStorage.getItem('docvault_token').
multer diskStorage writes file to config.uploadDir as {uuid}{ext}. fileFilter rejects non-PDF/JPEG/PNG MIME types with HTTP 500.

Inserts name, file_type (MIME string), file_path (/uploads/{uuid}{ext}), tags (comma-split from body or null), uploaded_by (req.user.email or null). RETURNING * — full row returned as response body with HTTP 201.

Fires AFTER INSERT on documents FOR EACH ROW. Copies id, name, file_type, file_path, uploaded_at, uploaded_by into documents_v2. Deliberately omits tags — documents_v2.tags is always NULL for uploaded documents.
